name: rca
description: Codex plugin shell for the RedCube AI visual deliverable domain app.

interface.shortDescription: Visual deliverable domain app for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds a thin Codex plugin entry for RedCube AI while routing generated status/session/manifest wrappers through OPL and preserving direct product invoke plus domain-handler export/dispatch targets.
defaultPrompt: Read the RedCube AI domain-handler export for this workspace.
Inspect the current OPL generated product-entry refs for RedCube AI.
Continue the active RedCube deliverable loop in the same entry session.
